description: Root React component and entry-point page of the TabCommand extension UI, mounted at / via React 18 createRoot. In the foundation build it renders an empty shell — the navy sidebar with the TabCommand logo and a content-area placeholder reading "TabCommand — modern rebuild in progress". Real features (Tabs, Labels, Search, LoadMeter, page routing, and chrome.storage wiring) arrive in later plans.
name: App

description: Maps a process's task tab ids back to tabs (chrome.tabs.get) and merges per-url process metrics into the updates object.
name: associateProcess

description: Empty trace/debug hook called throughout the background worker as a single instrumentation point; intentionally a no-op in the shipped build.
name: central

description: Moves a closed tab's url key to the front of `allUrls`, persists the reordered list, and invokes an optional callback.
name: closeUrl

description: Promise/callback hybrid wrapper around chrome.storage.local.get: invokes the callback when supplied, otherwise resolves with the result.
name: getLocalStorage

description: Promise wrapper around chrome.tabGroups.get that resolves null for absent/sentinel (-1) group ids.
name: getTabGroup

description: Derives a stable storage key for a URL by stripping the hash fragment and prefixing `url-`.
name: getUrlKey

description: Reconciles Chrome tab groups against the labels model: groups labeled tabs (creating/coloring groups as needed) and ungroups tabs that no longer belong to any label, skipping pinned tabs.
name: groupTabs

description: Diffs old vs new activeTabs to reconcile label membership when a tab moves between groups, adding/removing its url key from the affected labels; no-ops without a previous value.
name: handleActiveTabsGroupChanges

description: Popup entry point: focuses the existing pinned TabCommand app tab if open, otherwise creates one at index 0, then closes the popup.
name: init

description: Subscribes processProcesses to chrome.processes.onUpdatedWithMemory, guarded by try/catch so a missing processes API (non-Chrome / no permission) degrades quietly.
name: listenToProcesses

description: Reads the stored activeTabs and their url records and renders a row per active tab into the popup's #active container (currently unused by init).
name: loadActiveTabs

description: Registers a newly-visited URL: prepends its url key to the capped (250) `allUrls` history, evicting the oldest non-labeled keys from storage, and returns the storage updates. No-ops without a tabId/url.
name: newUrl

description: Extracts the integer Chrome tab id from a `tab-<n>` storage key.
name: parseTabId

description: chrome.processes update handler: aggregates per-process CPU/network/memory totals and associates them with tabs, persists the result, and after ~10 samples pauses listening for 15s to throttle.
name: processProcesses

description: Builds the per-url update record for a tab — resolving an empty object for invalid tabs and otherwise merging the stored url with fresh tab/process metadata via urlUpdates.
name: tabUpdates

description: Records a Chrome tab group's title keyed by its integer id in the worker's in-memory `groups` map, used to resolve a tab's label when its group changes.
name: trackGroup

description: Truncates a string to a maximum length, appending an ellipsis when it overflows; returns an empty string for falsy input.
name: truncateString

description: Thin write helper that persists an updates object to chrome.storage.local.set; the single storage-write chokepoint for the worker.
name: update

description: Queries all normal-window tabs and rebuilds the persisted `activeTabs` list (urlKey, pinned, groupId, timestamps, auto-closed state), debounced via waitingToUpdate, then writes it to chrome.storage.local.
name: updateActiveTabs

description: Accumulates a single process's cpu/network/privateMemory/jsMemoryAllocated/jsMemoryUsed into the running processTotals, treating missing metrics as 0.
name: updateTotals

description: Builds the HTML for one url row in the popup — title heading with favicon and a truncated title, plus an averaged CPU/NET/MEM stats block when the url has process samples.
name: urlHTML

description: Merges a tab's current title/favicon/groupId into a stored url record and accumulates rolling process metrics, normalizing the running averages once a sample window exceeds 100.
name: urlUpdates

description: Predicate that excludes empty and browser-internal tabs (chrome://, devtools://, chrome-extension://) from tracking.
name: validTab
